'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 9''' is the ninth issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Issue 9 was published in Fall [[1989]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Features===
*"The Ultimate Collection" by [[Adam Schultz]]
*"Sean Connery: Discovering the Bonds Between Father and Son" by [[Dan Madsen]] and [[John S. Davis]]
*"Inside ILM: ''The Abyss''" by John S. Davis
*"Sound Makes a Difference: A Look at Lucasfilm's Sprocket Systems" by [[Lisa E. Cowan]]
*"Keeping Up with Professor Jones" by [[R. Tomasic]]
